# template

```go
import "github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/internal/template"
```

Package template provides a simple template engine for PR descriptions and release notes. It supports \{placeholder\} syntax with nested placeholders like \{issue.key\}.

## Index

- [Constants](<#constants>)
- [type Template](<#Template>)
  - [func New\(content string\) \*Template](<#New>)

  - [func \(t \*Template\) Render\(data map\[string\]string\) string](<#Template.Render>)
  - [func \(t \*Template\) RenderWithDefaults\(data, defaults map\[string\]string\) string](<#Template.RenderWithDefaults>)


## Constants

<a name="PlaceholderBranchName"></a>Common placeholder names used in PR descriptions and release notes.

```go
const (
    PlaceholderBranchName            = "branchName"
    PlaceholderSummary               = "summary"
    PlaceholderDescription           = "description"
    PlaceholderIssueKey              = "issue.key"
    PlaceholderIssueSummary          = "issue.summary"
    PlaceholderIssueDescription      = "issue.description"
    PlaceholderIssueURL              = "issue.url"
    PlaceholderChanges               = "changes"
    PlaceholderFixedIssues           = "fixedIssues"
    PlaceholderFotingoBanner         = "fotingo.banner"
    PlaceholderVersion               = "version"
    PlaceholderFixedIssuesByCategory = "fixedIssuesByCategory"
    PlaceholderJiraRelease           = "jira.release"
)
```

<a name="DefaultFotingoBanner"></a>DefaultFotingoBanner is the default attribution text for fotingo.

```go
const DefaultFotingoBanner = "🚀 PR created with [fotingo](https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo)"
```

<a name="Template"></a>
## type [Template](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/template/template.go#L14-L16>)

Template represents a template string with placeholders.

```go
type Template struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="New"></a>
### func [New](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/template/template.go#L19>)

```go
func New(content string) *Template
```

New creates a new Template from the given content string.

<a name="Template.Content"></a>
### func \(\*Template\) [Content](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/template/template.go#L62>)

```go
func (t *Template) Content() string
```

Content returns the raw template content.

<a name="Template.HasPlaceholder"></a>
### func \(\*Template\) [HasPlaceholder](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/template/template.go#L67>)

```go
func (t *Template) HasPlaceholder(name string) bool
```

HasPlaceholder checks if the template contains a specific placeholder.

<a name="Template.Placeholders"></a>
### func \(\*Template\) [Placeholders](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/template/template.go#L73>)

```go
func (t *Template) Placeholders() []string
```

Placeholders returns a list of all placeholder names found in the template.

<a name="Template.Render"></a>
### func \(\*Template\) [Render](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/template/template.go#L25>)

```go
func (t *Template) Render(data map[string]string) string
```

Render replaces all placeholders in the template with values from the data map. Missing placeholders are kept as\-is \(e.g., "\{missing\}" stays "\{missing\}"\).

<a name="Template.RenderWithDefaults"></a>
### func \(\*Template\) [RenderWithDefaults](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/template/template.go#L31>)

```go
func (t *Template) RenderWithDefaults(data, defaults map[string]string) string
```

RenderWithDefaults replaces placeholders with values from data, falling back to defaults. If a placeholder is not found in data or defaults, it is kept as\-is.
